station_address: Ground Floor, R Kamani Rd, Ballard Estate, Fort, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001
text: This was my office for over 39 yrs. Was like a 2nd home. A world heritage stone building made by Britishers, it is bomb proof and should easily be over 85-95 yrs old! But still standing strong with pride. Very prototypical Victorian architecture for which, Ballard Estate is called `London of Mumbai´ and is world famous due to appearing in tons of bollywood movie scenes and advertisements.

station_address: Ground Floor, R Kamani Rd, Ballard Estate, Fort, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001
text: Among the three Bharat Petroleum offices in South Mumbai the Bharat Bhavan 1 building is the most recently renovated and ambient. It is opposite the Department of Posts building and has 3 petrol pumps within a distance of 100 meters. It is easily accessible from CST station. Petroleum is an essential service during covid times hence office is fully operational

station_address: Ground Floor, R Kamani Rd, Ballard Estate, Fort, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001
text:
Its one of the best among the OMCs. Its a PSU and is serving India with oil refining and distribution channels all over the country.
Bharat Bhavan is the official registered office of the company at Mumbai. There are separate buildings department wise, hence the numbers - '' Bharat Bhavan 2''
